sampled_explanations.reasoning: Built a RAG-based ranking pipeline serving 50M+ queries per month for an internal recruiter-facing search product. Some profile detail remains less complete around langchain.

Owned the end-to-end ranking pipeline at a recommendations-heavy consumer product: candidate sourcing → embedding generation (using a fine-tuned BGE-large) → Pinecone retrieval → learning-to-rank re-scoring (XGBoost) → behavioral-signal integration. Availability signals are weaker than the strongest candidates.
Built a content recommendation system serving 10M+ users that combined collaborative filtering with content-based ranking. India-based hybrid compatibility supports shortlist viability.
